sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48335" key="qeo/fantos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεό-φαντος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n48335.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">revealed by God</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">revealing God</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὄργια</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4077.tlg001:38" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Metrod.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">38</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
